children.html: L(μ,σ2)=∏i=1n12πσ2exp⁡{−(xi−μ)22σ2}=(12πσ2)n∏i=1nexp⁡{−(xi−μ)22σ2}\begin{align} L(\mu, \sigma^2) &= \prod_{i=1}^n \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi\sigma^2}} \exp \left \{ - \frac{(x_i - \mu)^2}{2\sigma^2} \right \} \\ &= \left( \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi\sigma^2}} \right)^n \prod_{i=1}^n \exp \left \{ - \frac{(x_i - \mu)^2}{2\sigma^2} \right \} \end{align}L(μ,σ2)​=i=1∏n​2πσ2​1​exp{−2σ2(xi​−μ)2​}=(2πσ2​1​)ni=1∏n​exp{−2σ2(xi​−μ)2​}​​

ln⁡L(μ,σ2)=nln⁡(12πσ2)+∑i=1nln⁡(exp⁡{−(xi−μ)22σ2})=nln⁡(2πσ2)−1/2+∑i=1n(−(xi−μ)22σ2ln⁡e)=−n2ln⁡(2πσ2)−∑i=1n(xi−μ)22σ2=−n2ln⁡(2π)−n2ln⁡σ2−12σ2∑i=1n(xi−μ)2\begin{align} \ln L(\mu, \sigma^2) &= n \ln \left( \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi\sigma^2}} \right) + \sum^n_{i=1} \ln \left( \exp \left\{ - \frac{(x_i - \mu)^2}{2\sigma^2} \right\} \right) \\ &= n \ln ( 2\pi\sigma^2 )^{-1/2} + \sum^n_{i=1} \left( - \frac{(x_i - \mu)^2}{2\sigma^2} \ln e \right) \\ &= - \frac{n}{2} \ln ( 2\pi\sigma^2 ) - \sum^n_{i=1} \frac{(x_i - \mu)^2}{2\sigma^2} \\ &= - \frac{n}{2} \ln (2\pi) - \frac{n}{2} \ln \sigma^2 - \frac{1}{2\sigma^2} \sum^n_{i=1} (x_i - \mu)^2 \end{align}lnL(μ,σ2)​=nln(2πσ2​1​)+i=1∑n​ln(exp{−2σ2(xi​−μ)2​})=nln(2πσ2)−1/2+i=1∑n​(−2σ2(xi​−μ)2​lne)=−2n​ln(2πσ2)−i=1∑n​2σ2(xi​−μ)2​=−2n​ln(2π)−2n​lnσ2−2σ21​i=1∑n​(xi​−μ)2​​

\begin{align}
\log 1 &= 0\\
\log_e e &= 1\\
\log x^a &= a\log x\\
\log \sqrt{a} &= \log a^{1/2} = \textstyle \frac{1}{2} \log a\\
\log ab &= \log a + \log b\\
\log \frac{a}{b} &= \log a - \log b
\end{align}
